spraycans_start: ^NICK: "Ooh! Hey, guys! Think you could buy me one of these?"
^NOUR: "...I didn't know you liked graffitti art."
^NICK: "Well, I don't really know how to do it..."
^NOUR: "Then... what are you going to do with these?"
^NICK: "It's... it's none of your business. Just lay off."
^MS. SUWAN: "You want to huff it, don't you."
^MS. SUWAN: "There are many reasons why entrusting a child with these is a terrible idea."
^NICK: "Who cares about that? I just want to have a little fun, geez!"
^NICK: "Please...? I'll pay you back afterwards, promise!"
^NOUR: "I'm going to have to agree with Ms. Suwan here."
^NOUR: "There's a reason why you have to be over 18 to purchase these."
^MS. SUWAN: "Nick, getting high is not a good path to take."
^NICK: "Sheesh, you sound like those Say No To Drugs assemblies we have in school."
^MS. SUWAN: "Good. That means I'm saying what you need to hear."
^MS. SUWAN: "Substance abuse is addictive, and will only harm your future."
^NICK: "But I have friends who do stuff like this all of the time, and they're fine!"
^NICK: "It's not like I have a bright future, anyways. Might as well have some fun."
^NOUR: "Nick, there's plenty of other things you can do for fun."
^NOUR: "Things that aren't dangerous that you'll actually enjoy."
^NOUR: "Alright, give me a bit, and we can definitely find something fun to do in this mall."
^NOUR: Maybe I can introduce him to photography?
^NOUR: That, or reading. I enjoy both, so maybe he will too...
^NICK: "I hope that whatever you're planning to show me is SO much fun!"
^NOUR: I should lead Nick somewhere that would inspire new interests.
spraycans_start_repeat: ^NICK: "Bringing me back here isn't really helping your point about 'better hobbies' or whatever."
^NOUR: "Okay, smart guy. I'll find something to prove my point."
^NOUR: Earlier, Nick said something about how he doesn't feel like he has a bright future.
^NOUR: It sounds like he doesn't have much confidence in his prospects.
^NOUR: I should help him find a hobby. Something that would give him a purpose.
^NOUR: Maybe we could go somewhere with books and read up about new things.
spraycans_afternickroute: ^NOUR: "When you're an adult, you can purchase whatever you want."
^NOUR: "We just hope they're decisions that benefit you, not harm you."
^NICK: "Don't worry. These didn't really interest me in the first place."
^NICK: "I just thought 'cause my friends did it... I should, too."
^NICK: "But I'd much rather play Aple Quest..."
^NICK: "So no more lectures, alright? I learned my lesson!"
^NICK: "And since you both taught me this gracious lesson..."
^NICK: "It's only right that I convert you both into Aple Quest fans too!"
^MS. SUWAN: "...Perhaps we did too good of a job."
